programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Strand and Dorie are marooned; Luciana aids a man in need; the group's efforts to help a stranger put everyone in danger.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Difficult decisions lead the group into uncertainty; Alicia delivers on a promise to Charlie.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group's hope falters as they seek a way out; Alicia and Charlie reunite with friends.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Morgan struggles to find the strength to help friends in dire need before it's too late.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Led by Morgan and Alicia, the group lands in uncharted territory in search of survivors to help; everything is not as it seems in this foreboding new land.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Morgan and Alicia meet a survivor and learn of a grave new walker threat; the mission is put to the test when one of their own goes missing; Strand makes contact.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: June and Dorie take shelter to hide from a threat, but a misunderstanding with a desperate survivor leads to trouble; Alicia and Morgan face a dangerous obstacle.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Charlie makes a friend, while Strand, Wendell, and Sarah's rescue mission hits a snag; Alicia, Luciana and Morgan struggle to fulfill their mission.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Althea chases a story with dogged determination, putting the mission, and her life in danger.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Facing impossible odds, Luciana and the group work together to tackle an impossible task while Morgan helps prevent disaster; an old friend presents Sarah, Charlie and Strand with a solution.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Strand and Charlie seek safety; Dorie helps Dwight on his quest; Morgan stays focused on the greater mission; Alicia refuses to give up.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Up against the clock, Morgan, Grace and Alicia work to buy time; Dorie and Dwight race against the elements; Sarah and Wendell get help from an unexpected source.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group, traveling in a convoy, doubles-down on their mission to help survivors; in an effort to encourage more survivors to reach out, Al, Luciana and Charlie document Morgan and the gang on a dangerous mission to help a reclusive survivor.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Morgan and Grace search an abandoned shopping mall for supplies and to fulfill a dying man's wish but the mission quickly turns to a fight for survival; Dwight's resolve to be a better man is tested.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: As Alicia struggles to find her new role in the convoy, she's drawn to mysterious artwork; a simple scouting trip is derailed when she and Strand are thrust into a conflict between desperate survivors; Morgan and Al hit a roadblock.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: In search of a permanent home for the convoy, Charlie is drawn to a synagogue where she encounters a rabbi surviving on his own; Sarah and Dwight face unexpected foes.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Logan's motives are revealed; Sarah, Dwight, and Luciana negotiate for the sake of the mission; Strand and Alicia race to the aid of a new survivor in a familiar place; a dangerous threat emerges.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: An encounter with a survivor sends Al and Morgan on a mission into a dangerous settlement; Al chases a lead while Morgan has an epiphany; Grace and Daniel make a connection.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: When Virginia makes a statement, Al responds in kind; facing dire circumstances, June leads the search for a new place to call home; with Grace's condition worsening, Morgan makes a tough call.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Facing an unknown future, Morgan leads the group on a mission; Al puts the pieces together; John and June make a promise.

programme.title: Dark Winds
programme.desc: Lt. Joe Leaphorn and Sgt. Jim Chee investigate the disappearance of a Navajo boy; Manuelito makes a sinister discovery while adjusting to life on the border patrol; an FBI agent comes to solve a case linked to Leaphorn's recent past.

programme.title: Dark Winds
programme.desc: Leaphorn and Chee find themselves on a manhunt after making a shocking discovery; Special Agent Washington questions Leaphorn about a person of interest; Manuelito puts her job on the line when she searches for answers at a local ranch.

programme.title: Dark Winds

programme.desc: John is settling in as one of Virginia's rangers when a mysterious death sends him on an investigation that makes him question everything he thought about himself.

programme.desc: Dwight and Sherry team up with a mysterious faction of people to take down Ginny; when Morgan unexpectedly offers to help, a power struggle ensues.

programme.desc: Mike Strong and his family had one of their best deer seasons ever in 2023! Additionally, good friend Trever Friend knocks down a big Indiana buck. Watch it all go down now!

programme.title: Life of Fire
programme.desc: When Pat's friends and fellow barbecue chefs, Bryan Furman and Dr. Howard Conyers, come to town, the guys dig deep into the tricks and traditions of one of Bryan's specialties: pork ribs.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Field To Fire
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern heads out on a hunt in South Carolina's low country, where thousands of wild hogs are leaving a wake of destruction as they ravage farm crops. After spending the day in a stand, he cooks wild hog two ways - a sour and spicy pork vindaloo with meet from the leg, and a whole hog slow roasted over the open fire.

programme.title: The Seahunter
programme.desc: Rob Fordyce embarks on a solitary quest against the silvery dance of tarpon, reflecting on the primal beauty of the Everglades with his flyrod in hand.

programme.title: The Seahunter
programme.desc: Rob Fordyce takes Charlie Schiffer on a reminiscent journey through the backcountry flats of their youth, bridging the gap between offshore thrills and the serene inshore waters they once fished side by side.

programme.title: The Seahunter
programme.desc: Rob Fordyce and daughter Kaylee Fordyce embrace some of America's heroes by teaching them the art of fly fishing, while taking some time out to fish with a couple of these amazing veterans.

programme.title: The Seahunter
programme.desc: Rob Fordyce sets off from Islamorada, FL, on a solo mission into the Atlantic, navigating the fast-changing seas to fine-tune his expertise and test new gear in the pursuit of sailfish.

programme.title: The Seahunter
programme.desc: Rob Fordyce heads offshore to chase world records with his daughter Kaylee and their good friend Mike. They manage to get the fly rods bent, but the tax man seems to have other ideas than letting Kaylee set another record.

programme.title: The Seahunter
programme.desc: Rob Fordyce guides Rachel, a vibrant single mom and budding angler, through the exhilarating world of saltwater fly fishing in the vibrant waters of Key West to chase permits while trying their best to fend off the sharks.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Montana Game Wardens set up an operation targeting illegal off-road vehicle usage. We also follow a patrol along the Missouri River, making sure the boaters are safe and legal.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Montana Game Wardens look into illegally taken antlers. Plus, follow along as they help with conservation efforts for sage grouse and walleye.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Snowfall in Montana make for treacherous waters, but that doesn't stop the annual boat float. Follow Montana Game Wardens as they patrol the rivers to ensure the safety and legal compliance of the boaters.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Montana Game Wardens patrol the high country during winter with snow mobiles. It's also elk season, and the wardens check for compliance with hunting laws.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: When your job is protecting our most precious natural resources in some of the nation's most remote areas, there is rarely a dull moment. Wardens chronicles the lives of Conservation Officers in America.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Opening day of big game season is busy for Montana's Game Wardens. Follow along as they patrol the Bitterroot game area. Plus, the wardens set up a sting to catch poachers, complete with a moving decoy.

programme.title: Survival Science
programme.desc: Nick and Laura head deep into the mountains to explore survival techniques that go far beyond anything they’ve learned before. Our courageous hosts subject themselves to intense survival training with the Survival Training School of California.

programme.title: Fight To Survive
programme.desc: While solo climbing Mt. Goddard, a remote peak in the California Sierra, Gregg Hein's leg is crushed by a boulder and he's sent careening down the mountain. Barely able to stop his fall, he's now faced with a horrific compound fracture.

programme.title: Tracks Across Africa
programme.sub-title: My Big 5 Only Needs One Leopard

programme.title: The Making of the Mob: Chicago

programme.title: The Making of the Mob: Chicago
programme.desc: Joe Accardo heads to Las Vegas; the Outfit is in trouble when Sam Giancana provokes a young attorney named Robert F. Kennedy.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob: Chicago
programme.desc: The fate of the Outfit lies in the hands of two men at odds with one another as Joe Accardo and Sam Giancana have a falling out; Joe Accardo ties up loose ends before he retires.

programme.title: True Crime Story: It Couldn't Happen Here
programme.desc: The town of Adel, Ga., is rocked by a brutal robbery homicide, and locals quickly point to an outsider as the killer; over 20 years later, new evidence raises the startling question if an innocent man is serving life for another man's crime.

programme.title: True Crime Story: It Couldn't Happen Here
programme.desc: When a beloved chiropractor in Sauquoit, N.Y., dies suddenly under strange circumstances, investigators discover she's been murdered with a rare poison; the killer could only be someone she knew closely, and the case divides the town.

programme.title: True Crime Story: It Couldn't Happen Here
programme.desc: A young woman in St. Augustine, Fla., with everything to live for is found shot to death with the gun belonging to her boyfriend, a deputy sheriff; he says it was suicide, but her family believes it was murder.

programme.title: True Crime Story: It Couldn't Happen Here
programme.desc: When an immigrant couple who settled in the Tennessee town of Cookeville is executed in their sleep and their house set on fire, investigators identify a suspect with motive; in their rush to make an arrest, they may have gotten the wrong man.

programme.title: True Crime Story: It Couldn't Happen Here
programme.desc: In rural Shelbyville, Ky., a body is found in the river; years go by until the police catch the killer, but some in town question if the suspect is even capable of committing the crime.

programme.title: True Crime Story: It Couldn't Happen Here
programme.desc: When a 22-year-old dancer goes missing, the men of the neighboring town who frequented the club she worked at become the suspect pool; wealth and status may protect a killer; a determined police officer works the case.

programme.title: True Crime Story: It Couldn't Happen Here
programme.desc: After a woman is found shot in her bathroom, officials launch a death investigation to determine if it was suicide - as her husband claimed - or murder; years later, the case remains open, and the town still has questions.

programme.title: True Crime Story: It Couldn't Happen Here
programme.desc: A young single mother disappears without a trace; an investigation suggests she abandoned her children, while her family spends years proving she was murdered and finding her killers.

programme.title: True Crime Story: It Couldn't Happen Here
programme.desc: A man claims he shot his daughter's estranged husband, Chirstian Griggs, in self-defense; after investigators close the case, Christian's family discovers evidence that the killing was not justified.

programme.title: True Crime Story: It Couldn't Happen Here
programme.desc: A beloved town doctor perishes in a deadly house fire - which investigators conclude was arson; aut after securing a murder conviction, the prosecutor doubts his own evidence, and joins the fight to free an innocent man.

programme.title: True Crime Story: It Couldn't Happen Here
programme.desc: Cold case investigators, looking into a shocking double murder, elicit a series of confessions from a group of teens; years later, the teens recant their statements.

programme.title: True Crime Story: It Couldn't Happen Here
programme.desc: A criminal defense attorney, known for uncovering corruption, finds himself on trial; accused of a complex murder-for-hire plot, along with eight others, he fights to clear his name and show the many holes in the state's case.

programme.title: True Crime Story: It Couldn't Happen Here
programme.desc: A couple is found brutally murdered in their home; investigators learn that the last person to see them alive had secrets of his own; some question whether prejudice led police to arrest the wrong man.

programme.title: True Crime Story: It Couldn't Happen Here
programme.desc: A dentist is brazenly killed by a masked gunman; the media reports salacious details as investigators uncover a sinister plot led by the dentist's wife and stepson; a private investigator shares a startling alternate theory.

programme.title: True Crime Story: It Couldn't Happen Here
programme.desc: After a teenage girl is found murdered in her car on the side of a highway, a stranger from out of town is convicted of her murder; when the deputy who originally discovered the body becomes sheriff, he calls everything into question.

programme.title: True Crime Story: It Couldn't Happen Here
programme.desc: When the body of a missing student is discovered in the river near a small college town, the community questions the role law enforcement may have played in his death.

programme.title: True Crime Story: It Couldn't Happen Here
programme.desc: When a beloved member of a tight-knit community is killed, the town cries out for immediate justice; after a young man is sentenced to death for the crime, and an out-of-town lawyer argues they convicted an innocent man.

programme.title: True Crime Story: It Couldn't Happen Here
programme.desc: The murder of a gender-nonconforming Black teenager remains unsolved despite pressure from family and friends - raising issues about the increase of violence, and the lack of justice for trans murder victims across the country.

programme.title: True Crime Story: It Couldn't Happen Here
programme.desc: Years after the body of a young woman is found strangled to death in a creek bed, law enforcement finally closes the case; a closer look raises questions about the investigation.

programme.title: True Crime Story: It Couldn't Happen Here
programme.desc: On a remote island, a dispute between two lobstermen is settled the way islanders do: face-to-face; the conflict turns deadly when one swings an ax - leaving locals to dispute whether the death was self-defense or murder.

programme.title: True Crime Story: Look Into My Eyes
programme.desc: At North Port High School in Florida, three students die within months of each other; as the community learns more, they discover a common thread: all three students were hynotized by their principal, Dr. George Kenney, not long before they died.

programme.title: True Crime Story: Look Into My Eyes
programme.desc: Dr. George Kenney begins to reveal his side of the story; as details emerge about the deaths and Marcus, Wesley and Brittany's parents speak out, an investigation into Kenney's hypnosis practice begins; the North Port community grows suspicious.

programme.title: True Crime Story: Look Into My Eyes
programme.desc: The press catches wind of the story and it captures headlines worldwide; Dr. Kenney is asked to leave North Port High, and as the criminal trial heats up, the community is split on his culpability; a student comes forward with a new perspective.

programme.title: True Crime Story: Look Into My Eyes
programme.desc: Pressure mounts against the school board to take accountability; Dr. Kenney leaves North Port for what seems like the final time; the community grapples with guilt and grief; Stephen offers an intimate look into Kenney's hypnosis practice.

programme.title: True Crime Story: Indefensible
programme.desc: An Arizona man claims jewelry thieves killed his wife, but his story unravels almost immediately; his temporary insanity defense, however, proves to be a formidable opponent in court.

programme.title: True Crime Story: Indefensible
programme.desc: Police believe they've solved a mysterious death in Florida, but at trial the case takes a shocking turn, and a seemingly straight-forward case of murder by strangulation spirals into a bizarre crime story.

programme.title: True Crime Story: Indefensible
programme.desc: A man with a violent criminal history is imprisoned after he nearly kills his girlfriend; just months after he's released early on parole, he finds himself at the center of another tragic case.

programme.title: True Crime Story: Indefensible
programme.desc: Two strangers meet at a bar, but their evening ends with a gruesome death; police think they know who's to blame, but questions of motive leave them stumped.

programme.title: True Crime Story: Indefensible
programme.desc: One woman escapes the clutches of a New Jersey serial killer; the friends and family of another victim set a trap to deliver the killer to police.

programme.title: True Crime Story: Indefensible
programme.desc: Two elderly women in Los Angeles seem to pull off the perfect murder; when they try to pull it off again nearly six years later, things don't go as planned.

programme.title: Phantasm 5: Ravager
programme.desc: Reggie wanders through the desert, but suddenly awakes in a different dimension.

programme.title: Paycheck
programme.desc: Michael Jennings works on top-secret projects. After each job, his memory is erased. After his latest assignment, he is shocked to be told that he agreed to forfeit all payment, until he receives an envelope containing clues to his forgotten past.

programme.title: The Ring
programme.desc: When four teenagers all meet with mysterious deaths exactly one week after watching a videotape, investigative reporter Rachel Keller tracks down the video... and watches it.

programme.title: The Ring Two
programme.desc: When evidence at a local crime scene reveals a mysterious unmarked videotape, Rachel realizes that Samara is back and more determined than ever to continue her relentless cycle of terror.

programme.title: Red Eye
programme.desc: Moments after takeoff, Lisa's seatmate, Jackson, menacingly reveals the real reason he's on board: He is an operative in a plot to kill a rich and powerful businessman .... And Lisa is the key to its success.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Raiders of the Lost Ark
programme.desc: Get ready for thrills in Indiana Jones and the Raiders of the Lost Ark. Indy and his ex-flame Marion Ravenwood dodge booby-traps, fight Nazis, and stare down snakes in their incredible worldwide quest for the mystical Ark of the Covenant.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
programme.desc: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom brings you thrills and excitement. Indy, his sidekick Short Round and nightclub singer Willie Scott go from high-flying action above the Himalayas to a spine-tingling escape from a fortress-like mine in India.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
programme.desc: There's nothing more exciting than trying to keep up with the Joneses in Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade. Indy's Nazi enemies are back and have kidnapped his father, in their effort to locate the sacred Holy Grail.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull
programme.desc: STEVEN SPIELBERG and GEORGE LUCAS bring you the greatest adventurer of all time! Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull finds Indy trying to outrace a brilliant and beautiful agent for the mystical, all-powerful crystal skull of Akator.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The NCIS team investigates the murder of a Navy lieutenant commander while dealing with her distraught husband. Meanwhile, Ziva ponders the future when Ray returns.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: While stopping by his usual diner for coffee, Gibbs finds himself in grave danger, prompting him to think about his past and the choices he made in his life.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: When a Navy captain is found dead and dressed in a weird costume under his uniform, the team comes upon a secret society consisting of real-life superheroes, and they have to track down the villain in the story with the help of Tony's ex-fiancee.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team must investigate the apparent suicide of a Navy reservist with a high security clearance. Suicide is the apparent cause of his death, but is it the right one?

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Egos soar out of control when Sabrina uses magic to become a rock star.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch
programme.desc: When Sabrina switches personalities with Libby, she uses her magic and newly found popularity.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch
programme.desc: A talking car causes Sabrina a big headache.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Public speaking seems like a breeze for Sabrina after coming face-to-face with her fears in the Other Realm.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch
programme.desc: A school trip to Disneyworld becomes yet another test for Sabrina on the road to her witch's license

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina realizes the importance of her Quizmaster after she inadvertently gets him fired.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch
programme.desc: After her aunts decide to go their separate ways, Sabrina has to choose which of the two should raise her.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: Elka brings home a rescue dog, Joy starts dating a man she met in her therapist's waiting room, and Victoria's agent recommends she make a sex tape to jumpstart her career.
programme.sub-title: Dog Tricks, Sex Flicks & Joy's Fix

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: Trying again for her green card, Joy gets engaged to a homeless man, Victoria lands a local news correspondent job, and Melanie dates a Cavaliers coach.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: Victoria tries to win over the difficult kids of a man she likes, Elka is resistant to wintering in Florida with Max, and Melanie and Joy volunteer at a senior center.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: As Victoria interviews the governor's candidly opportunistic wife, Elka goes on trial and attempts to sway the verdict by flirting with an elderly juror.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: Elka's on the lam and the women go looking for her…in Amish country. Meanwhile, Joy's a source of scandal as the Governor's alleged mistress and faces deportation while Victoria finds herself a little too "at home" with the Amish.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: The women are terrified that an ex-con Victoria deceived will show up at the house, and Joy finally meets her son Owen, who thinks it may be best not to stay in contact.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: After getting each other dates for another shared fake birthday, the women's night involves a Jesus look-alike, Siamese twins, an impressionist, and an astute waiter.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: While rehearsing for a battle of the bands, Rick poaches away talented lead singer Joy, leaving Melanie, Victoria and Elka no choice but to use autotune microphones.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: A strangler who writes the poetry of Byron in lipstick on the legs of two victims, one of them Danny's fiancée, must be stopped in time to prevent a third murder.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Steve McGarrett must apprehend a hoodlum and his girlfriend in order to save their lives. The two are being sought by two men from whom they stole a large cash ransom which they acquired by carrying out an abduction.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Monte Markham plays convicted murderer Harry Kellem, whom Five-O must try to prove innocent in order to save the life of a prison doctor who Kellem is holding hostage

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: McGarrett's investigation into the death of a real estate agent leads to the island of Maui.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: A prisoner is broken out of prison by a wealthy gangster so he can mastermind a $10 million robbery of the Honolulu Diamond Exchange.
programme.sub-title: Ten Thousand Diamonds And A Heart

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Some of the world's most iconic, sacred temples were built atop the ruins of structures that are far more ancient; investigating what compelled early humans to rebuild in the same places again and again.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens

programme.title: Ancient Aliens

programme.title: Ancient Aliens

programme.title: Ancient Aliens

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Theorists speculate about the existence of black holes on Earth, which may explain strange disappearances and other inexplicable phenomena.

programme.title: South Park: Starvin' Marvin
programme.desc: Starvin' Marvin: During a Terrance & Phillip ad-break the boys decide to adopt an Ethiopian child, swayed by the promise of a free digital watch. Mobs of wild turkeys rampage through town! (S1, E08)

programme.title: South Park: Mr. Hankey the Christmas Poo
programme.desc: Mr Hankey, The Christmas Poo: The Mayor decides to impose a holiday theme which won't offend anybody. Kyle tries to convince everyone that Mr Hankey (a singing Christmas poo) exists. (S1, E09)

programme.title: South Park: Tom's Rhinoplasty
programme.desc: Tom's Rhinoplasty: The boys become lesbians to impress a new teacher, making Wendy jealous. Also, to his delight, Mr. Garrison's plastic surgery leaves him looking like David Hasselhoff. (S1, E11)

programme.title: South Park: Mecha Streisand
programme.desc: Mecha-Streisand: Cartman and Kyle fall out over a magic triangle they un-earth on an archaeological dig. The triangle yields the power to turn Barbra Streisand into a terrible monster. (S1, E12)

programme.title: South Park: Hotter than Summer: Cartman's Mom is a Dirty S**t (Part 1)
programme.desc: Cartman's Mum Is A Dirty S**t (1): Dr. Mephisto helps Cartman un-cover the truth about his dad's identity. The spotlight is on quite a few of South Park's male residents. Who could it be? (S1, E13)
programme.sub-title: Hotter than Summer: Cartman's Mom is a Dirty S**t (Part 1)

programme.title: South Park: Hotter than Summer: Cartman's Mom Is Still A Dirty S**t (Part 2)
programme.desc: Cartman's Mum Is Still A Dirty S**t (2): Dr Mephisto is shot before he reveals who Cartman's father is. Who exactly shot him? Meanwhile, the rest of the town try to deal with a blizzard. (S2, E02)
programme.sub-title: Hotter than Summer: Cartman's Mom Is Still A Dirty S**t (Part 2)

programme.title: South Park: Hotter Than Summer: Chickenlover
programme.desc: Chicken-Lover: When Barbrady calls the boys in to help solve the case of the notorious, perverted Chicken-Lover, Cartman gets a little carried away with his new-found 'authoritah'. (S2, E03)

programme.title: CBS Weekend News
programme.desc: Journalist Adriana Diaz anchors the Saturday edition of the CBS news program from Chicago, while Jericka Duncan takes the helm of the Sunday broadcast from New York. The two are the latest to fill the roll of weekend anchor, which was most recently represented by Reena Ninan and Eliane Quijano. The program offers the latest headlines, original reporting and in-depth pieces that add context and perspective to the world's events.

programme.title: 60 Minutes
programme.desc: The oldest and most-watched newsmagazine on television gets the real story on America's most prevalent issues. CBS News correspondents contribute segments to each hourlong episode. Topics range from hard news coverage to politics, lifestyle, pop culture, business, health, and science. The correspondents and contributors include Lesley Stahl, Scott Pelley, Anderson Cooper, Bill Whitaker, Sharyn Alfonsi, Jon Wertheim and Norah O'Donnell .

programme.title: 60 Minutes
programme.desc: The oldest and most-watched newsmagazine on television gets the real story on America's most prevalent issues. CBS News correspondents contribute segments to each hourlong episode. Topics range from hard news coverage to politics, lifestyle, pop culture, business, health, and science. The correspondents and contributors include Lesley Stahl, Scott Pelley, Anderson Cooper, Bill Whitaker, Sharyn Alfonsi, Jon Wertheim and Norah O'Donnell .

programme.title: 18 Wheels of Justice
programme.desc: When Chance's old C.O. from the Rangers is implicated in a daring weapons theft, Chance comes to defend him and get the guns back.

programme.title: 18 Wheels of Justice

programme.title: 18 Wheels of Justice

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: When a lawyer's murder is staged like a dog attack, Murdoch suspects the culprits are after a dog bequeathed a fortune.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries

programme.sub-title: We Take Care of Our Own

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: While the electrocution of a young woman leads Murdoch to a war between rival electricity suppliers, and no less than Nikola Tesla, Crabtree finds himself attracted to a suspect.

programme.desc: Suspicion falls on the wife of a professional boxer when he winds up dead after winning a fight he was supposed to lose, but Murdoch believes she's innocent.

programme.desc: Murdoch teams up with his hero to solve a murder that was revealed during a seance.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: This newsmagazine investigates intriguing crime and justice cases that touch on all aspects of the human experience. Over its long run, the show has helped exonerate wrongly convicted people, driven the reopening -- and resolution -- of cold cases, and changed numerous lives. CBS News correspondents offer an in-depth look into each story, with the emphasis on solving the mystery at its heart. The program and its team have earned critical acclaim, including multiple Emmy, Peabody and Edward R. Murrow Awards.

programme.title: CBS Weekend News
programme.desc: Journalist Adriana Diaz anchors the Saturday edition of the CBS news program from Chicago, while Jericka Duncan takes the helm of the Sunday broadcast from New York. The two are the latest to fill the roll of weekend anchor, which was most recently represented by Reena Ninan and Eliane Quijano. The program offers the latest headlines, original reporting and in-depth pieces that add context and perspective to the world's events.

programme.title: 60 Minutes
programme.desc: The oldest and most-watched newsmagazine on television gets the real story on America's most prevalent issues. CBS News correspondents contribute segments to each hourlong episode. Topics range from hard news coverage to politics, lifestyle, pop culture, business, health, and science. The correspondents and contributors include Lesley Stahl, Scott Pelley, Anderson Cooper, Bill Whitaker, Sharyn Alfonsi, Jon Wertheim and Norah O'Donnell .

programme.title: CBS News Sunday Morning
programme.desc: The sparkling notes of a trumpet fanfare and the familiar logo of the sun alert viewers that it's time for CBS's Sunday morning staple. Journalist Jane Pauley helms the show, taking over hosting duties from Charles Osgood, who spent 22 years on the job. A morning talk show, this program airs at a different pace and focuses much of its attention on the performing arts. After a quick update of the day's news and national weather, correspondents offer longer-length segments on a variety of topics, from architecture to ballet to music to pop culture to politics.

programme.desc: Burglars ransack the Seaver home and steal the family's most valuable possession - their sense of safety.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: When Carol's head is turned by a new student, Carol's relationship with her boyfriend Bobby becomes rocky.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: When Jason tells Ben to face his tonsillectomy like a Seaver, Ben is ready to give up his family membership.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: After starring in last year's hit play, Mike decides to skip this year's auditions and head to Broadway.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: When Carol turns in a paper she barely worked on and gets an A+, she becomes disillusioned with education.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Jason Seaver feels dispirited and useless until he meets a sad, scruffy young girl who needs his help.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: When Mike puts off finishing his English paper, Jason tries a bit of reverse psychology to motivate him.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Jason and Maggie are shocked when Carol announces her engagement to Bobby.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Jason and Maggie drift further apart when Maggie's new job demands more and more of her time.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.sub-title: The Mom Who Knew Too Much
programme.desc: After Maggie tells Jason one of Carol's most intimate secrets, Carol becomes furious with her mom.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Without his parents' approval, Mike flies to Los Angeles to surprise his Hawaiian girlfriend Melia.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: In the first of a two-part episode, Jason and Maggie chaperone a high school dance attended by Carol and Mike.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: In the second of a two-part episode, Jason and Maggie compete to see who's the better DJ at a dance.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Pregnant, tired, and overworked, Maggie tries to muster the courage to tell her boss she's having a baby.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.sub-title: Obscure Objects of Our Desire Part 1
programme.desc: In the first of a two-part episode, household objects recall their history with the Seaver family.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.sub-title: Obscure Objects of Our Desire Part 2
programme.desc: In the second of a two-part episode, household objects recall their history with the Seaver family.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.sub-title: How The West Was Won, Part 1
programme.desc: Coach Lubbock's contract is up at the end of the semester, so Mike organizes a strike to keep his job.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.sub-title: How The West Was Won, Part 2
programme.desc: After protesting the firing of Coach Lubbock, Mike is suspended from school, and the coach won't talk to him.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Mike's graduation stirs memories from his proud parents, who recall his birth and first day of school.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Ben goes out on his first date, while a pregnant Maggie tests Jason's patience.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Maggie goes into labor on Ben's birthday, and he feels upset when the baby gets more attention than him.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Now that he feels too old to play by the family's house rules, Mike moves out of the house and into his car.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Mike converts the space above the garage into an apartment and must choose whether he wants to be a tenant.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Jason sends his mother on a cruise to ease the pain of her husband's death, but she returns with a fiancé.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Carol is nominated for Homecoming Queen, but she questions whether she belongs in the contest.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Mike is embarrassed by the prize-winning picture he took for a photography class.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: When Ben throws himself a birthday party to invite his crush, there's one problem - it's not his birthday!

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: When Maggie goes back to work after the birth of her baby, Jason hires a college student to serve as a nanny.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: A trip to Martha's Vineyard goes wrong when Mike and Julie are the only ones who make the ferry.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Carol meets a guy at the library and gets away with a late-night return home, but their date ends poorly.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: A local women's group wants to give Maggie an award, but she's called to cover a strike before she can accept.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: When Boner joins the Marines after failing his first semester at college, Mike feels abandoned.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Brad Pitt guest stars as rock star Jonathan Keith, and Maggie manages to get Ben backstage to meet him.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Jason and Maggie are in for a surprise when an anniversary party is planned without their knowledge.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Mike gets a part-time job, but he's upset upon realizing his racist boss favors him because he's white.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: When Jason and Maggie dole out punishments to the kids based on gender, they're accused of sexism.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: In Carol's interview for Boston College - her parents' alma mater - she tries to fail to avoid going there.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: When Jason tries to help Mike with his psychology homework, Jason does even worse than his son.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: When Carol's boyfriend Sandy doesn't show up for a date, Sandy's friend reveals Sandy has been in an accident.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Wally and Irma invite everyone to a wedding on the same ship where they first met.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Jason apologizes to everyone, while Irma and Wally are married.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: When Mike announces his plans to marry Julie, he shocks the Seaver household.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: As the big day approaches, Mike begins to have doubts about getting married to Julie.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: When Carol's college plans are temporarily dashed, she takes an unexpected turn into the work force.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Mike is excited about starting a new acting class, but his arrogant teacher has "artistic" ideas about acting.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Carol feels pressure from her family to start dating again and pretends an older man is her new boyfriend.

programme.title: America Says
programme.desc: "Teacher Mentors vs. Potluckers Two teams of friends race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun. John Michael Higgins hosts.

programme.title: America Says
programme.desc: "Recently Engaged vs. Math Teachers" Two teams of friends and family race the clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun. John Michael Higgins hosts.

programme.title: Common Knowledge
programme.desc: "Do-Gooders vs. Pool Hall Pals" Joey Fatone hosts as teams of three compete to answer practical, everyday questions that everyone should know, such as what is the best way to thaw a frozen turkey.

programme.title: Common Knowledge
programme.desc: "Teachers vs. Pranksters" Joey Fatone hosts as teams of three compete to answer practical, everyday questions that everyone should know, such as what type of produce can reduce itching in a bug bite.

programme.title: Idiotest
programme.desc: "Choir Boys vs. Traveling Friends" Comedian Ben Gleib hosts as two choir boys face off against a two friends who love to travel to answer increasingly difficult brain teaser puzzles.

programme.title: Idiotest
programme.desc: "Blind Dates 3" Comedian Ben Gleib hosts this special episode of Idiotest where both teams are on blind dates with their teammates; watch as they get to know each other while competing to answer increasingly difficult brain teaser puzzles.

programme.title: Catch 21
programme.desc: "One for the Money, 21 for the Show" Players add cards by answering pop trivia questions and try to build the closest hand to 21 without "busting" in this fast-action game of knowledge and strategy.

programme.title: Catch 21
programme.desc: "Aces For Everyone!" Players add cards by answering pop trivia questions and try to build the closest hand to 21 without "busting" in this fast-action game of knowledge and strategy.

programme.title: Catch 21
programme.desc: "Let's Not Draw This Out" Players add cards by answering pop trivia questions and try to build the closest hand to 21 without "busting" in this fast-action game of knowledge and strategy.

programme.title: Baggage
programme.desc: "Crafting the Perfect Date" Jerry Springer hosts as daters decide how much emotional "baggage" they are willing to put up with when finding love. A dater must choose between men whose baggage includes lying about his occupation to pick-up women and crocheting on rainy days.

programme.title: Baggage
programme.desc: "Animal Instincts" Jerry Springer hosts as daters decide how much emotional "baggage" they are willing to put up with when finding love. A dater must choose between women whose baggage includes always being an hour late to dates and living with 15 wild animals.

programme.title: Baggage
programme.desc: "Brush with Destiny" Jerry Springer hosts as daters decide how much emotional "baggage" to put up with when finding love. A dater must choose between men whose baggage includes being terrified of butterflies and not going to the dentist for 15 years.

programme.title: Baggage
programme.desc: "A Taste for Danger "Jerry Springer hosts as daters decide how much emotional "baggage" they are willing to put up with when finding love. A dater must choose between men whose baggage includes playing computer games 10 hours a day and making dates eat rattlesnake.

programme.title: Mind of a Man
programme.desc: "I'm Here To Educate" Comedian DeRay Davis hosts a game show in which two female contestants, with the help of a celebrity panel, try to figure out what men really think. Celebrity panelists: Naim Lynn, Julia Lillis, Alonzo Bodden.

programme.title: Divided
programme.desc: "Convince Me" This unique game show is as much about convincing others as it is about being right. Four strangers must debate and unanimously agree on the answers to questions including whose portrait is set to replace Andrew Jackson's on the $20 bill.

programme.title: Divided
programme.desc: "Battle of the Booted" This special episode features contestants who have been eliminated in a previous episode, back for a chance at redemption. These four strangers must debate and unanimously agree on the answers to trivia and social survey questions.

programme.title: Baggage
programme.desc: "Birthday Party of One" Jerry Springer hosts as daters decide how much emotional “baggage” to put up with for love. A dater must choose between men whose baggage includes dressing up as Britney Spears and refusing to celebrate girlfriends' birthdays.

programme.title: Baggage
programme.desc: "Hungry for Love" Jerry Springer hosts as daters decide how much emotional “baggage” to put up with when finding love. A dater must choose between women whose baggage includes not allowing any food in her house and stealing money from church.

programme.title: Baggage
programme.desc: "Geek Chic" Jerry Springer hosts as daters decide how much emotional “baggage” to put up with when finding love. A dater must choose between men whose baggage includes being a marching band geek and having secretly dated two sisters simultaneously.

programme.title: Baggage
programme.desc: "At Your Wreck and Call" Jerry Springer hosts as daters decide how much emotional “baggage” to put up with to find love. A dater must choose between men whose baggage includes sucking on freshly lit matches and always being an hour late on dates.

programme.title: Mind of a Man
programme.desc: "Alfred" Comedian DeRay Davis hosts a game show in which two female contestants, with the help of a celebrity panel, try to figure out what men really think. Celebrity panelists: Finesse Mitchell, Bethany Dwyer, and Doboy.

programme.title: Divided
programme.desc: "Shark Infested Waters" This game show is as much about convincing others as it is about being right. Four strangers must debate and unanimously agree against a racing clock to answer questions including which sports send the most people to the ER.

programme.title: Divided
programme.desc: "Time is Money" This game show is as much about convincing others as it is about knowing the right answers. Four strangers must debate and unanimously agree against a racing clock to answer questions including why parents homeschool their kids.

programme.title: 25 Words or Less
programme.desc: 25 Words or Less includes two teams comprised of celebrities and civilians against each other in a fast-paced word game with a top prize of $10,000. In the beginning rounds of the game, after a frenzied bidding session, one team member provides clues to two partners to help them guess a list of five words using only 25 words or less.

In the beginning rounds of the game, after a frenzied bidding session, one team member provides clues to two partners to help them guess a list of five words using only 25 words or less.

programme.title: 1 vs 100
programme.desc: Carrie Ann Inaba hosts this game where one player ("The One") is pitted against "The Mob" of 100 people, with each trying to correctly answer a series of multiple-choice trivia questions for a potential jackpot of $50,000.

programme.title: Tug of Words
programme.desc: "Escape Room Experts" Samantha Harris hosts this wordplay game show where two teams compete to answer word clues.

programme.title: Emogenius
programme.desc: "Team PB & J vs. Team Half Baked" Two teams compete using emojis to solve pop culture puzzles.

programme.title: Emogenius
programme.desc: "Team Bootylicious vs. Team Twerking In The Galley" Using emojis to solve pop culture puzzles, two teams compete to see who is the best at using everyone's favorite texting language. In this episode friends battle it out. Hunter March hosts this game show.

programme.title: Get A Clue
programme.desc: "Swept Away" Get a clue or give a clue in this exciting word puzzle game. Each team must do both, taking turns guessing words and giving hints down the line in the hopes of making it to the final round. Rob Belushi hosts.

programme.title: Get A Clue

programme.desc: When Stanley is being inattentive towards Helen, she decides to make him jealous by pretending to have an affair with the gardener. Both Anne and Jeffrey Brookes decide to help out and also hire some other guys to pose as Helen's lover.

programme.title: The Ropers
programme.desc: The clock Stanley gives Helen for their anniversary turns out to be stolen from Brookes' apartment.

programme.title: The Ropers
programme.desc: A man shows up and claims to be Stanley's son. Stanley admits to know his mother, but doesn't remember the night that she claimed to conceive her son. Roper goes to talk to a friend who was with him at the time to find out if the claims are true.

programme.title: The Ropers
programme.desc: Helen's mother comes for a visit. But later it is revealed that she has no place to go. So Helen and her two sisters get together to decide what to do, cause none of them really want her living with them.

programme.title: The Ropers
programme.desc: Running out of money, Stanley needs to take a job on the killing floor at his brother-in-law Hubert's meat packing plant. Later, his fortunes change when he learns Hubert is planning a secret trip to Acapulco with his secretary.

programme.title: Check It Out
programme.desc: Memories may be a beautiful thing but the staff at Cobb's find themselves wishing to forget some of their past mistakes for the 50th anniversary of Cobb's.

programme.title: Check It Out
programme.desc: Howard is thrilled with the new video security system until he learns that one of the pieces of outmoded equipment it promises to replace is Alf Scully. Bannister's please to Mrs. Cobb go unheeded and Alf is let go. After receiving a bomb threat, Mrs. Cobb has a change of heart.

programme.title: Check It Out
programme.desc: Edna has found out she's pregnant! As soon as Howard is in a good modd, she plans to tell him. Unfortunately this seems to be Howard's worst week so she's forced to tell him in less than ideal circumstances.

programme.desc: There isn't enough parking at Cobb's. Bannister finds himself parking in Christian's spot which leads to everyone starting to car-pool. Christian want's money from everyone for gas, but no one wants to pay. Bannister discovers Edna has been throwing out all of her parking tickets.

programme.title: Check It Out
programme.desc: Murray is saving to buy Bannister's old car, but at five dollars a payment, it's going too slow. He gets a tip from a customer for setting him up with another customer. programme.sub-title: Love is a Many Splendored Alf

programme.title: Stoked on Fishing - Back Country Trout Fishing
programme.desc: What a journey it's been over the last three weeks! We kicked off our adventure in Eastern Sears Creek, making our first casts to see what the waters would yield. From there, we headed to South Lake for some laid-back pontoon trout fishing. After a relaxing day by the lake, complete with apple pie and cold beverages, we followed expert advice from Jared to venture back into the heart of nature. Our trek led us to Long Lake, nestled just above South Lake, offering more stunning views and fishing spots. Today on Stoked on Fishing, we're picking up where we left off. We'll dive deeper into understanding the lakes, figuring out what the rainbow and brook trout are biting on, and trying our best to land a few. Join us as our backcountry adventure continues.

programme.title: Stoked on Fishing - Bishop Creek Fishing
programme.desc: Growing up in Southern California, there’s a special spot my dad would always take us: the Eastern Sierras. If you love the outdoors, trout fishing, and pure beauty, the Sierras have it all. We especially enjoy venturing up in the fall when the weather changes, the fall colors start popping, and the fishing is phenomenal. The Sierras offer endless options for camping, hiking, and fishing, and that’s exactly what we’re doing for the next couple of weeks. Join us as we explore some creek fishing around Park's Resort, lake fishing at South and Sabrina Lake, and then head into the backcountry for an epic day hike. Don’t miss out on this adventure through one of the most picturesque and diverse regions of California!

programme.title: Angling Buzz - Summer Midwest Fishing
programme.desc: It's late June and right now it's primetime for hot river fishing across the Upper Midwest for a variety of different reasons. Number one would be the low stable flows of the rivers, most of the rivers are also running fairly clear. Number two is it puts fish in fairly identifiable areas in the river thanks to the current. Today's guests is Captain Ben Wolfe of Sport Fish Michigan who targets a wide variety of fish throughout the river systems of Michigan.

programme.title: Blood Glacier
programme.desc: Scientists discover that a red liquid leaking from a nearby glacier contains organisms that turn living hosts into deadly mutants.

programme.title: The Hunt

programme.title: Anything for Jackson
programme.desc: A sinister couple hatch a supernatural scheme to resurrect their dead grandson through a pregnant woman.

programme.title: Speak No Evil

programme.title: Revenge

programme.title: Mad God
programme.desc: A figure known as The Assassin descends from the heavens into a nightmarish pit full of monsters, titans and cruelty.

programme.title: One Cut of the Dead
programme.desc: Real zombies attack a hack director and a film crew who are shooting a low budget zombie film in an abandoned WWII Japanese facility.

programme.title: Dark Glasses
programme.desc: Diana, a prostitute who was blinded by a serial killer in a botched attack, takes in a young Chinese boy named Chin, abruptly altering both of their lives forever.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: A trainee nurse arrives for her first day at the empty East London Royal Infirmary, where she's forced to face her own traumatic past to confront the malevolent force that's intent on destroying everything around her.

programme.title: Mandy
programme.desc: An outsider seeks bloody vengeance against the sadistic cult leader who destroyed his peaceful existence.

programme.desc: A woman must confront an ancient and powerful entity after her daughter mysteriously vanishes in the cellar of their new home.

programme.title: Satan's Slaves
programme.desc: After dying from a strange illness that she suffered for three years, a mother returned home to pick up her children.

programme.title: The Room
programme.desc: A couple discover a strange room in their new house that grants material wishes, but all they want is a child.

programme.desc: A teen's home videos lead to a series of horrifying revelations.

programme.title: The Cast
programme.desc: Trenton goes down North Carolina to learn the family secrets of the Forehand family. Ben Forehand is a guitarist for Christian Contemporary artist Pat Barret. When Ben isn’t playing guitar, he runs Wild and Free Outfitters getting people into the outdoors hunting and fishing, getting their minds off of the everyday grind. . Even though fishing is tough the guys build strong friendships and lasting memories.

programme.title: Baitfuel Fishing Tournament
programme.desc: The final qualifier for the season finds the teams in Cardinal, Ontario, taking on the St. Lawrence River. It’s the last chance for teams to qualify for the Tour Championship.

programme.title: Sportsmans Journal
programme.desc: Staying mobile and drilling lots of holes while chasing roaming bluegills on the ice is the name of the game. Using larger baits like spoons also separates the littles from the Bulls!

programme.title: Louisiana Catch and Cook
programme.desc: When you bring a chef from Philadelphia to the bayou, you're in for an exciting adventure. Join Louisiana Celebrity Chef Jay Ducote (known as the guy who beat Bobby Flay), along with Philadelphia's own Chef Brian Duffy (famous from Bar Rescue), and Captain Craig as they kick off our two-part journey in the heart of Jefferson Parish, specifically in the fishing village of Lafitte. Experience Gator Town and the beautiful amenities at Elsa's Place, along with the thrill of reeling in redfish and speckled trout on the water. All of this is just a 45-minute drive from the New Orleans airport. What are you waiting for?

programme.title: Destination Dive
programme.desc: On this show we highlight some of the best diving in the lower Keys. From the wreck of the Vandenberg too the beautiful reefs in Key West, this show has it all.

programme.title: Ship Shape TV

programme.title: Mighty Bite

programme.title: HuntStand TIps and Gear
programme.desc: Join Cody Butler for a deep dive into ground blind strategies for bowhunting turkeys. Discover essential tips and tactics for bagging big toms with your bow from ground blinds. Learn about optimal blind placement for a successful turkey hunt.

programme.title: HuntStand TIps and Gear
programme.sub-title: HuntStand Tips & Gear - "Introducing the Savage Ultralite Elite Rifle"
programme.desc: The Savage 110 Ultralite Elite is a lightweight, compact rifle that's ideal for backcountry hunters. This rifle cuts weight with features such as a Proof Research carbon-fiber wrapped stainless-steel barrel and MDT HNT26 folding carbon-fiber stock.

programme.title: Louisiana Catch and Cook
programme.desc: When you bring a chef from Philadelphia to the bayou, you're in for an exciting adventure. Join Louisiana Celebrity Chef Jay Ducote (known as the guy who beat Bobby Flay), along with Philadelphia's own Chef Brian Duffy (famous from Bar Rescue), and Captain Craig as they kick off our two-part journey in the heart of Jefferson Parish, specifically in the fishing village of Lafitte. Experience Gator Town and the beautiful amenities at Elsa's Place, along with the thrill of reeling in redfish and speckled trout on the water. All of this is just a 45-minute drive from the New Orleans airport. What are you waiting for?

programme.title: The Cast
programme.desc: Trenton goes down North Carolina to learn the family secrets of the Forehand family. Ben Forehand is a guitarist for Christian Contemporary artist Pat Barret. When Ben isn’t playing guitar, he runs Wild and Free Outfitters getting people into the outdoors hunting and fishing, getting their minds off of the everyday grind. . Even though fishing is tough the guys build strong friendships and lasting memories.

programme.title: Local Lines

programme.title: Breaking Boundaries

programme.title: FinQuest Outdoors

programme.title: Operation Healing Heroes
programme.desc: 82 year old Navy veteran with more than 2.7 million TikTok followers, Patriotic Kenny talks of how he helps other vets through him gifting mobility scooters to fellow veterans in need.

programme.title: Operation Healing Heroes
programme.desc: U.S. Army veteran Domingo Martinez recounts overcoming the life altering effects of trauma he received as a child and on the DMZ.

programme.title: The Raven Project
programme.desc: While Randy and Dustin are trying to get the farm ready for Fall plots and create new access trails, Cody is at the river living life to the fullest. Randy finally has had enough and is doing something about Cody’s lack of effort on the farm.

programme.title: The Raven Project
programme.desc: From the ground up host Randy Birdsong will take you through the trials and tribulations of owning his first farm and grooming it to be one of the best whitetail hunting properties in the country.

programme.title: The Raven Project
programme.desc: The boys are in Missouri at the Raven and they are ready to burn some powder and get rifle season kicked off at the Raven.

programme.title: The Raven Project
programme.desc: It’s the opening week of rifle camp and everyone is ready to go. Big Hoss has a close encounter with a big eight point and Cody finds himself having a little Déjà vu when a big buck walks out into the same plot he killed in last year.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: The story of the game changing 350 Legend cartridge is documented at deer camps across the midwest with the Keefer Brothers in Kansas, Mark and Terry Drury in Missouri, Melissa Bachman in Nebraska and Team Winchester back in Missouri.

programme.title: The Journey Within
programme.sub-title: "North American Deer Slam - Mexican Texanus Whitetail"
programme.desc: Continuing on with his quest for The North America Deer Slam, Mark Peterson packs his Gunwerks Nexus 300 PRC rifle for a hunt in Mexico targeting the elusive Mexican Texanus Whitetail from elevated blinds. The outfitter here has done an amazing job managing the deer numbers and age groups to grow giant whitetails. Mark is anticipating the pre-rut will get these big bucks moving.

programme.title: The Journey Within
programme.desc: Mark Peterson continues his quest on the Hearst Ranch in California. Next up on the list, California Aoudad. These Aoudad were introduced to the ranch in the early 1920s and have thrived ever since.

programme.title: Hunting Land Man
programme.desc: A Southwest Mississippi GIANT “Barry” has made more daylight appearances than possibly any mature bucks in existence. Now that Slade is back from the midwest The chase is on.

programme.title: Team200
programme.desc: Team200 travels to New Mexico in search of giant Elk, part 2.

programme.title: Blair Wiggins Outdoor

programme.title: Canadian Whitetail
programme.desc: Part 1 of Taylors Excalibur Crossbow hunt for an ancient Boone and Crocket typical.

programme.title: HuntStand Presents
programme.sub-title: "Second Chance - Hunting the November Rut in Ohio"
programme.desc: Hunting has a way of grounding us, reminding us of what truly matters: shared moments and unforgettable memories. Chance and Ashleigh Eckert are on their first out-of-state hunt in the rolling hills of Ohio. After overcoming a life-changing kidney transplant, their story is one of faith, love, and resilience. While the goal was a big buck, the true reward was the time spent together and the lessons learned along the way. Because hunting is about so much more than the harvest — it’s about the journey.

programme.title: Hunting Land Man
programme.sub-title: "Opening Week in Mississippi started off with a BANG!!"
programme.desc: Opening day in Mississippi has arrived and Slade is taking full advantage of it! With the weather not cooperating Slade and Zeb stumble into a turkey hunt they won't soon forget. Two days later, the hot streak continues with Slade connecting on another turkey on an 83 acre property he has for sale! Also, Slade gives some tips and his ideas on small acreage hunting, and how it can be just as lucrative as big tracks of land!

programme.title: The Hunted Land & Sea

programme.title: Behind The Draw
programme.sub-title: "Chasing Buddy! Mike's Last Day Miracle On A BIG Colorado Buck!"
programme.desc: When you think of hunting Colorado, Big Whitetails might not necessarily come to mind. However, Mike is very familiar with Eastern Colorado and the whitetails here specifically. He has hunted with his friends that run this ranch for years now and helped them manage this special piece of land. There is an absolutely, incredible age class of deer that live here with some of the most unique hunting Colorado has to offer. In this particular story Mike takes his bow-hunt down to the final day of his hunt while he is after a certain buck they've nicknamed "Buddy".

programme.title: The Green Way Outdoors
programme.desc: Kyle and Jeff embark on a 20-day mission into the Everglades to find the invasive pythons that are plaguing the ecosystem. These apex predators have eliminated more than 90% of fur-bearing animals in their new home. Can they turn the tide, or is the Everglades already lost?

programme.title: The Green Way Outdoors
programme.desc: Kyle and Jeff get bit by catfish in Southern Oklahoma with YouTuber Nate Williams of Adrenaline Rush Adventures while using the most primitive fishing tactic - hand fishing. Learn from the Chickasaw Nation about the history of this method that has been used by Native Americans for thousands of years.

programme.title: The Green Way Outdoors
programme.desc: Kyle and Jeff dive into the wild waters off Hawaii’s coast, coming face-to-face with sharks and graceful manta rays. The adrenaline peaks when Kyle takes a heart-pounding leap off a towering 40-foot cliff, making this adventure as daring as it is unforgettable.

programme.title: Louisiana Catch and Cook
programme.desc: In this episode, Chef Jay Ducote brings along a very special fishing buddy, his dad, for our first-ever Catch & Cook freshwater adventure! We’re heading to the legendary Toledo Bend, famous for its sac-a-lait (Cajun for crappie) and ranked among the top bass lakes in the U.S. It’s a bucket-list stop for anglers everywhere, but trust us, the story doesn’t end with the fish. - Steeped in Spanish, French, and Native American roots dating back to the Louisiana Purchase, this region serves up culture and flavor as rich as its fishing. We’ll be staying at Wildwood Resort, hitting the water with Captain Matt Loetscher of Living The Dream Guide Service, and capping off the day with spectacular lake views from their breezy lakeside bar. - Hook, line, and sinker — you don’t want to miss this one! - Ready to go catchin’ with one of Louisiana’s best captains? Visit www.LouisianaCharterFishing.com to check availability or book your trip today!

programme.desc: Captains Scott Walker and Steve Rodger break in Plantation Boat Mart’s new 36’ Invincible with some muttons for dinner and an epic shallow water sailfish double.

programme.title: Into The Blue
programme.desc: Captains Scott Walker and Steve Rodger fish with Daiwa’s Marc Mills out of Plantation Boat Mart trying out all of Daiwa’s new jigging equipment.

programme.title: TRP
programme.desc: Today we’re talking with Nick Haddad about his innovative fishing conservation initiative, "Return 'Em Right," focused on boosting the survival rates of reef fish caught and released in the Gulf of Mexico. Teaming up with Florida Sea Grant, University of Florida, Gulf States Marine Fisheries Commission, NOAA, and a diverse coalition of partners, the project delivers training, equipment, and research funding to tackle depredation and release mortality issues. Moreover, it evaluates the efficacy of descending devices, ultimately promoting improved fish survival, a more robust fishery, and enriched angling experiences across the Gulf of Mexico. - This podcast is presented by Black Rifle Coffee - Use code BLASTOFF25 for 25% off - Salt Strong Insiders Club: https://bit.ly/RowlandMembership - LMNT Electrolytes Special Offer: http://DrinkLMNT.com/TomRowland - If you have questions or suggestions for the show you can text Tom at 1 305-930-7346 - This episode has been brought to you by Waypoint TV. programme.desc: October is here. We start out in Nebraska, head to Kansas and end up in Georgia. Many people have been impacted by the recent hurricanes. To help those in need we are hunting does and will donate as much venison as we possibly can to the victims.

programme.desc: Realtree's Tyler Jordan and Michael Pitts hunt the tail end of the rut in Georgia. The bucks are still chasing the remaining does in heat as the weather cools off in the south.

programme.title: Realtree Road Trips
programme.sub-title: Road Trips - "The Story of Stomper Jr.- "
programme.desc: After 3 years, Tyler kills “Stomper,Jr.” and he just might be the new Louisiana state record buck. We scored him at 203" gross and 193" net typical. We thoroughly enjoyed chasing this magnificent animal in Louisiana with our good buddies Drew Keith and Cole Cooper. Hope you enjoy watching this video just as much as we enjoyed putting it together!

programme.title: Realtree Road Trips
programme.desc: Join Bryan Brown, Rigsby Stewart, and Chase Herndon along with Lee Ellis on our annual opening week hunt in Northern Nebraska. Big Bucks were spotted and a tag was punched on an unexpected buck on opening day!

programme.title: Beyond The Surface

programme.title: Beyond The Surface
programme.desc: Today, Capt. Danny is in Stuart, FL. Joined by 16-year-old angler, Denton Potter. The two are targeting the local bridge dwelling giants, while going “Beyond The Surface” into Denton’s story.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Nikki Boxler’s life in Update New York on her family farm raising cattle and producing maple syrup is a few thousand miles from the hills of New Mexico. We’ll take a look into Nikki’s life back home and then follow along as she visits the small town of Quemado and its bustling population of 228, while she pursues bugling elk with her favorite Winchester in hand. We’ll also head to Missouri and Texas to chase whitetails with Chris Keefer and Paul Sawyer.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: We set out to tell the tale of Marion - and his legendary Mack’s Prairie Wings, smack dab in the middle of the world famous Stuttgart, Arkansas - the land of ducks and rice. Get an inside look at a man that many consider to be larger than life, from those that knew him best, like his cousin and fellow hell raiser, Bud McCollum. We’ll even hear a story or two from Milton Stovesand, an 81 year old former waterfowl guide and Mack’s employee who actually guided John Olin a time or two, and ran the timber holes with Marion. It’s timber holes and tall tales. It’s cups of coffee and cupped up wings. It’s partners in business, and partners in potholes and it’s pure Arkansas...just like Marion.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Melissa Bachman has made her name over the last two decades as one of the most dedicated hunters and producers in the outdoor industry. In this episode we’ll tag along with Melissa while she chases big game around the world with her Winchester in hand. First we’ll head to Colorado as Melissa spot and stalks giant mule deer, then we’ll head across the pond to New Zealand to chase mountain ibex and tar, then head back to the states for Montana whitetail at ground level.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Shotgun sports are experiencing unprecedented growth, with competitions across the country gaining popularity as enthusiasts vie to be the best shooters in the world. Every summer, the Amateur Trapshooting Association hosts The Grand American in Sparta, Illinois. This year marks the 125th Anniversary for the largest trap shooting competition in the world. We’ll talk with the people who make this tournament run behind the scenes and explore what makes this tournament such a special event. We’ll also look at the rich history of The Grand. On-site we’ll chat with the curator of the Trapshooting Hall of Fame and look at some of the incredible historical pieces on display in the museum. Additionally, we’ll learn about White Flyer and how the clay manufacturer has made important innovations for the shotgun sports.
Follow Team200’s crew of traditional archers as they chase big - whitetails in Canada!

programme.title: Global Getaway
programme.desc: This week on Getaway Nicky Buckley winds up our Christmas Markets cruise in Europe, enjoying all the festive favorites through Germany and into Amsterdam.

programme.title: FinQuest
programme.desc: In Episode 3 of FinQuest, Ryan Miller joins Captain Alex from Supremacy Fishing Charters for an offshore adventure targeting big fish off shore. Starting at the Palm Beach Inlet, the team uses planar fishing techniques to hook wahoo and other catches like kingfish and amberjack. Along the way, firefighter Johnny Bennett shares his journey from fishing to starting a popular fish dip business. The day wraps up with thrilling doubleheader catches and a conservation message, showcasing the importance of sustainable fishing practices.

programme.title: Fishing With Jay
programme.desc: We sent Jay to the shark bite capital OF THE WORLD, it just so happens to be in our backyard. Watch Jay get shark bit in the scariest episode yet.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: Chef Jean-Paul Bourgeois and the crew are back at it for season 3 of duck camp dinners. With a historically dry year in Louisiana, the team dodges marsh fires, hunts alligators, and prepares for the opening day of teal season.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: Follow the DCD crew as they head North to hunt with duck call maker Brad Eldrige. Despite tough hunting conditions brought on by a historic drought in Louisiana, the crew is able to knock down a “Tensas Limit” of wood ducks, mallards, honkers, and squirrels.
